description: Composition Brushed dew blue jeans made of a cotton and lycra blend fabric, has two insert pockets on the front with a patch pocket inside the right one and metallic buttons on the pocket ends, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing with embroidered branding on the right pocket at the back, loops on the waist and has a metal zipper and button closure Fit Slim fit Low rise Tapered leg Wash care Turn inside out before washing and drying Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or dry flat in shade Warm iron If you're a denim person, then these brushed dew blue jeans from wrangler are perfect for you. With a low waist, great slim fit and made of stretchable fabric, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Its tapered leg style allows you to pair it with slim girly tops and stilletos or kurtis and sleek sandals for that feminine touche. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 39" Height: 5'8", Waist: 26", Hips: 36"
